---
title: "04_models_rf_xgboost"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# PURPOSE: Estimate Random Forest and XGBoost models across all three horizons
# ASSIGNED TO: Person 3 (Modeling and Results)
# DEPENDS ON: 02_feature_engineering.R output in data/processed/

# REQUIREMENTS:
# - Use tidymodels / parsnip interface
# - Time-series cross-validation via rsample::rolling_origin() for tuning
# - Hyperparameter tuning required on at least one model (recommend XGBoost)
# - Grid search via tune::tune_grid() with TimeSeriesSplit-compatible CV
# - Save feature importance plots to paper/figures/
# - Save metrics to output/predictions/

```{r main}
library(tidymodels)
library(ranger)
library(xgboost)
library(tidyverse)

message("04_models_rf_xgboost.R: Not yet implemented.")
```
